items.name: David Sánchez
items.content: Professional quality and a flawless shopping experience. I recommend it to all my clients.

items.question: How do I download my products?
items.answer: After purchasing, you'll receive an email with the download links. You can also access them anytime from your user dashboard under the 'Downloads' section.

items.question: Do licenses expire?
items.answer: No, all licenses are perpetual. Buy once and use the product forever, including all future updates.

items.question: Can I use the products in commercial projects?
items.answer: Yes, all our licenses allow commercial use. The single license is for one site and the unlimited for unlimited projects.

items.question: Do you offer technical support?
items.answer: Yes, we offer premium support for 6 months included with each purchase. You can extend the support anytime.

items.question: How do updates work?
items.answer: Updates are free for life. We'll notify you by email whenever a new version is available.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept credit/debit card (Stripe), PayPal, MercadoPago, Binance Pay, cryptocurrencies and bank transfer.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.s1Content: By accessing and using this website, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part, you should not use our services.
terms.s2Content: When purchasing a digital product, you receive a non-exclusive, non-transferable license for its use. The individual license allows use on 1 website or project. The unlimited license allows use on multiple projects. Resale, redistribution, or sublicensing of products without express authorization is not permitted.
terms.s3Content: All digital products available on TodoWP are the property of their respective creators. Purchasing a product does not transfer its intellectual property, only grants a usage license according to the specified terms.
terms.s4Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You must immediately notify any unauthorized use. TodoWP is not liable for losses arising from unauthorized access to your account.
terms.s5Content: TodoWP provides products and services 'as is', without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that products will work without interruptions or errors in all environments. Use of products is at your own risk.
terms.s6Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon posting. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email, billing information and payment details when making a purchase. We also collect site usage data through cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.s2Content: We use your information to process orders, provide support, send product updates, improve our services, and send marketing communications (only if you have given consent).
privacy.s3Content: We do not sell your personal information. We share data with payment processors (Stripe, PayPal) to complete transactions and with email services for communications. All third parties comply with data protection standards.
privacy.s4Content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. We use SSL encryption, secure authentication, and protected password storage through hashing.
privacy.s5Content: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your personal data. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time by contacting our support team.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1Content: Cookies are small text files that websites place on your device to store information about your preferences and browsing activity.
cookies.s2Content: We use essential cookies for site functionality (session, authentication), preference cookies (language, dark mode), and analytical cookies to understand how our site is used and improve it.
cookies.s3Content: Some services we use (Stripe, Google Analytics) may place cookies in your browser. These cookies are subject to the privacy policies of those third parties.
cookies.s4Content: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or to notify you when a cookie is sent. However, some site features may not work properly without cookies.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.s1Content: Due to the digital nature of our products, we generally do not offer refunds once the product has been downloaded. We recommend carefully reviewing the description, demos, and requirements before purchasing.
refund.s2Content: Refunds will be considered in the following cases: (a) the product does not work as described and the seller cannot resolve the issue within 7 business days, (b) the product was not delivered or the file is corrupt, (c) duplicate purchase due to technical error.
refund.s3Content: To request a refund, contact our support team within 14 days of purchase. Include the order number, product, and a detailed explanation of the issue. We will evaluate each case individually.
refund.s4Content: Approved refunds will be processed within 5 to 10 business days and will be issued through the same payment method used for the purchase. You will receive an email confirmation when the refund is completed.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The premium marketplace where the best creators share their digital products with the world.
about.p1: TodoWP was born in 2024 with a clear mission: to create the best digital products marketplace for professionals. We believe creators deserve a fair platform, with powerful tools and a community that values their work.
about.p2: We work with the world's best studios and independent developers to offer you themes, plugins, templates, scripts, and SaaS starters of the highest quality. Each product goes through a rigorous review process before being published.
about.p3: Today, thousands of professionals trust TodoWP to power their projects. From freelancers to agencies and startups, our platform is the meeting point between talented creators and demanding buyers.
about.v1Desc: We only accept products that meet our quality standards. Each submission is manually reviewed.
about.v2Desc: 100% secure payments, verified licenses, and buyer protection on every transaction.
about.v3Desc: Personalized attention for every client. Response in less than 24 hours, always.
about.v4Desc: Creators and buyers from around the world. Products in multiple languages and currencies.
about.joinContent: Whether you're a creator looking to sell your products or a professional seeking the best tools, TodoWP is your place. Explore our catalog, discover amazing products, and join the world's largest creator community.
